race.comment: HEAVENLY LOVE (1) goes well for hoop Savva who has a win and four placings from just seven steers and will be rock-hard fit for this. Strikes a winnable contest here and should be right there when the whips are cracking. FIRE AND LIGHT (2) wasn't disgraced in town last time out and gets some weight off from the favourable draw. Expected to play a major role in the outcome. SAMURAI WARRIOR (3) saves his best form for this track and trip with two wins from as many attempts. Has to be included. O'CALDINO (6) got the job done at Ballina at the latest outing and is sure to have taken some confidence from that victory. In the mix. MOONFLEET (8) next in line from the low draw.
